sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13245" key="a)pomotiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομοτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n13245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of abjuration,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόγος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> </cit> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inCat.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:406:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">406.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
